name: Sequential Switch Matrix
description: Four-input, four-output sequential switch matrix with comparator gate outs, 8-bit DAC, banked memory, random recall, CV-selectable matrices and rear mix access.

controls.name: Routing Buttons 1-4
controls.description: Toggle the routing state for each input/output crosspoint.

controls.name: Matrix
controls.description: Shows the current matrix in hexadecimal.

controls.name: Save
controls.description: Writes the current state to non-volatile memory.

controls.name: Top
controls.description: Sets or clears the reset point used while stepping.

controls.name: CV Limit
controls.description: Limits CV addressing to the Top matrix when enabled.

controls.name: CV Sets Top
controls.description: Uses CV to set the current top matrix instead of offsetting the counter.

controls.name: Step Down
controls.description: Makes stepping count down instead of up.

controls.name: Gate Rnd
controls.description: Makes gate-step advances pick a random matrix within the Top limit.

controls.name: Hold / Slave
controls.description: Freezes the counter or hands control to MIDI CC when slaved.

controls.name: Reset
controls.description: Resets the matrix counter to zero.

controls.name: Rnd Rcl
controls.description: Makes recalled matrices randomise on recall.

controls.name: CV Scale
controls.description: Scales the CV input before it is added to the offset.

inputs.name: Inputs 1-4
inputs.description: Bipolar signal inputs for the routing matrix.

inputs.name: Compare In
inputs.description: Comparator reference voltage for the output-high gate.

inputs.name: Step Input
inputs.description: Trigger input that advances the matrix counter.

inputs.name: Reset Input
inputs.description: Trigger input that resets the counter to the top or bottom depending on direction.

inputs.name: MixIn rear
inputs.description: Rear unity-gain access to the inputs of each channel.

inputs.name: InNML rear
inputs.description: Rear access to the input normals.

outputs.name: Outputs 1-4
outputs.description: Matrix outputs containing any routed and summed input signals.

outputs.name: Comp Out
outputs.description: High gate when an output exceeds the Compare In voltage.

outputs.name: DAC 1:2 Out
outputs.description: 8-bit weighted DAC output from the first two routing columns.

outputs.name: MixOut rear
outputs.description: Rear output bus containing the summed channel outputs.

behaviors.name: Banked matrix memory
behaviors.description: The module stores 16 matrices per bank and recalls them independently, with Rnd Rcl optionally randomising on recall.

behaviors.name: Top-limited stepping
behaviors.description: The matrix counter can step only within a chosen range, which makes the module behave like a short sequencer or a bounded router.

behaviors.name: Comparator gate extraction
behaviors.description: Each channel can emit a 10V gate when its output rises above the comparator threshold, turning routing states into rhythm control.

behaviors.name: 8-bit DAC source
behaviors.description: The first two columns form a weighted 8-bit DAC, which can output a stable control voltage even when the matrix is also routing audio or CV.

behaviors.name: Hold and MIDI slave
behaviors.description: The counter can freeze, or hand selection over to MIDI CC when connected to the legacy bus-board manager.

behaviors.name: Rear mix linkage
behaviors.description: The rear connectors let a second SSM inherit the first module's channels, effectively chaining matrices into a larger router.

patchIdeas.name: Four-source drum router
patchIdeas.patch: Four drum voices feed the four inputs. Step Input advances the matrix each bar so the output routing changes on cue, while Comp Out can fire envelopes whenever a voice rises above the threshold.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sequential Switch Matrix:
* Bank: 0
* Matrix: 0
* Top: 3

Drum 1:
Drum 2:
Drum 3:
Drum 4:
Mixer:
Envelope:
Clock:

- Drum 1 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Drum 2 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Drum 3 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Drum 4 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Clock (Out) t> Sequential Switch Matrix (Step Input)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Comp Out) t> Envelope (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: 8-bit pitch source
patchIdeas.patch: Use the first two columns as a weighted DAC and feed DAC 1:2 Out into a quantizer or oscillator. The matrix becomes a stepped pitch source that can still be re-routed live with the routing buttons.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sequential Switch Matrix:
* Bank: 1
* Matrix: 7
* CV Limit: on

Quantizer:
VCO:
Envelope:
VCA:

- Sequential Switch Matrix (DAC 1:2 Out) >> Quantizer (In)
- Quantizer (Out) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Clock (Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Comparator gate sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: A slow LFO into CV Input sweeps the matrix selection while Compare In turns the outputs into gates whenever the selected signal rises past threshold. The patch behaves like a pseudo-sequencer with gate accents.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sequential Switch Matrix:
* Bank: 2
* Matrix: 4
* CV Limit: on

LFO:
Envelope:
VCA:
Filter:

- LFO (Out) >> Sequential Switch Matrix (CV Input)
- LFO (Out) >> Sequential Switch Matrix (Compare In)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Comp Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Filter (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Banked scene changes
patchIdeas.patch: Store different routings across the four banks, then step or CV-scan between them while keeping the actual audio sources connected on the rear MixOut bus. This gives quick scene changes without rewiring the rack.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sequential Switch Matrix:
* Bank: 0
* Matrix: 0
* Rnd Rcl: off

Source 1:
Source 2:
Mixer:
Output:
Clock:

- Source 1 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Source 2 (Out) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (Inputs 1-4)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (MixOut rear) -> Sequential Switch Matrix (MixIn rear)
- Clock (Out) c> Sequential Switch Matrix (Step Input)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Random recall switcher
patchIdeas.patch: Enable Rnd Rcl and use a trigger into Reset to bounce through unpredictable matrices. The module stays clockable but each recalled state can come back with a different routing pattern.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sequential Switch Matrix:
* Bank: 3
* Rnd Rcl: on
* Gate Rnd: on

Clock:
Envelope:
Drum:

- Clock (Out) c> Sequential Switch Matrix (Step Input)
- Clock (Out) t> Sequential Switch Matrix (Reset Input)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Outputs 1-4) -> Drum (Trig)
- Sequential Switch Matrix (Comp Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Drum (Out) -> Output (In)
